Published: May 3, 2026 | Last reviewed: May 3, 2026

Brufen 400 mg — Uses, Dosage, Side Effects Pakistan

TL;DR — Key Takeaways
  • Brufen 400 = ibuprofen, NSAID hai
  • Adult dose: 200-400 mg har 4-6 ghante baad
  • Khaane ke baad lein — khaali pet stomach ulcer
  • Dengue, pregnancy 3rd trimester mein BILKUL avoid
  • Long-term use mein kidney aur stomach damage

Brufen 400 Kya Hai?

Brufen Abbott Laboratories ka brand name hai ibuprofen ke liye. Yeh NSAID (Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory Drug) class ki dawai hai jo pain, inflammation, aur fever ke khilaaf kaam karti hai.

Brufen 400 — Quick Facts
Generic nameIbuprofen
ClassNSAID (Non-Steroidal Anti-Inflammatory)
ManufacturerAbbott Pakistan
Common strengths200 mg, 400 mg, 600 mg, syrup for kids
OTC200-400 mg available without prescription
Pakistan price~25-40 PKR per strip of 10

Brufen 400 Kis Liye Use Hoti Hai?

1. Pain Relief

  • Sir dard, migraine
  • Dant dard
  • Period cramps (sab se effective)
  • Body aches, muscle pain
  • Joint pain (arthritis)
  • Back pain
  • Post-surgery pain

2. Inflammation

  • Arthritis (rheumatoid, osteoarthritis)
  • Tendinitis, bursitis
  • Sports injuries
  • Sprains aur strains

3. Fever

  • Mosmi viral fever
  • Bacterial infections (antibiotic ke saath)
  • NOT for dengue — bleeding risk

4. Specific Uses

  • Migraine attack
  • Gout flare
  • Kidney stones pain (saath mein antispasmodic)

Dosage

Adults (12+ Saal):

  • Single dose: 200-400 mg har 4-6 ghante baad
  • Maximum per 24 hours: 1,200 mg (3 tablets of 400 mg) OTC
  • Prescription max: 2,400 mg (6 tablets) per day
  • Khaane ke baad lein — pet ka khayal
  • Onset: 30-60 minutes
  • Duration: 4-6 hours

Bachon Ke Liye (Brufen Syrup):

Dose weight pe depend karta hai — 10 mg/kg har 6-8 ghante baad:

  • 3-6 mahine (5-7 kg): 2.5 ml — sirf doctor mashware se
  • 6-12 mahine (7-10 kg): 2.5 ml
  • 1-3 saal (10-15 kg): 5 ml
  • 4-6 saal (15-20 kg): 7.5 ml
  • 7-10 saal (20-30 kg): 10 ml

6 mahine se kam baby mein Brufen avoid karein — Calpol use karein.

Brufen Kab Lein?

  • Pain ke shuru mein, wait na karein
  • Period cramps mein period start ke 1 din pehlay shuru karein
  • Khaane ke baad ya milk ke saath
  • Bohat zyada paani piyo

Brufen Side Effects

Common (Halki):

  • Pet kharab, mitli
  • Acidity, heartburn
  • Sir dard (ironic)
  • Halki dizziness

Serious:

  • Stomach ulcer aur bleeding — sab se bara khatra
  • Kidney damage — long-term use mein
  • Heart attack/stroke risk — high dose long-term
  • Allergic reactions — rash, asthma attack
  • Liver problems (rare)
  • High BP
  • Fluid retention

Kab Brufen BILKUL Avoid Karein

  • Dengue fever — bleeding risk (sirf Panadol)
  • Pregnancy 3rd trimester — fetal heart aur kidney issues
  • Active stomach ulcer
  • Severe kidney disease
  • Heart failure
  • Allergic to NSAIDs
  • Asthma (severe NSAID-sensitive)
  • Bleeding disorders
  • 6 months se kam baby

Brufen 400 vs Panadol

Brufen 400Panadol 500
NSAID + anti-inflammatoryPain killer + fever only
Khaane ke baadKhaali pet OK
Pet ulcer riskLiver risk (overdose)
Period cramps betterGeneral pain
Pregnancy 3rd trim avoidPregnancy safe
Dengue NAHIDengue safe
Stronger anti-inflammatoryNo anti-inflammatory

Pain ya inflammation 3 din se zyada chal raha hai? Ilaaj AI pe doctor se mashwara — proper diagnosis aur stronger options.

Doctor Se Mashwara

Drug Interactions

  • Aspirin: Combination khatra (bleeding)
  • Warfarin (Coumadin): Bleeding risk badh jata hai
  • BP medicines: Effect kam hota hai (ACE inhibitors, ARBs)
  • Diuretics: Kidney damage risk
  • Lithium: Toxicity
  • Methotrexate: Toxicity
  • Steroids: Stomach ulcer risk doubles
  • Alcohol: Stomach bleeding risk

Pet Protect Karein

Long-term Brufen use ho raha ho to:

  • Khaane ke saath ya doodh ke saath lein
  • Bohat paani
  • Empty stomach pe na lein
  • Acid reducer (Risek 20, Pantop) doctor se discuss
  • 2 hafte se zyada bina doctor mashware nahi

Brufen Overdose

Symptoms:

  • Mitli, ulti, pet dard
  • Khoon ki ulti ya kaali potty
  • Drowsiness
  • Tinnitus (kaan mein awaaz)
  • Confusion
  • Seizures (severe cases)

Action: Foran 1122 ya nearest ER. Activated charcoal effective hai 1 ghante mein.

Pakistan Mein Different Brands

Sab same ibuprofen hain:

  • Brufen (Abbott)
  • Profen (CCL Pharma)
  • Inflam (Highnoon)
  • Ibugesic (Cipla)
  • Ibuprofen generic

Stronger NSAIDs (Doctor Parchee Se)

  • Diclofenac (Voltral, Dyclomex 75): Stronger, gel form bhi
  • Naproxen (Naprosyn): Long-acting
  • Meloxicam (Mobic): Selective COX-2
  • Celecoxib (Celebrex): Less stomach risk, mehnga

Pakistan Mein Common Misuse

  • Empty stomach pe lena
  • 2 hafton se zyada use bina doctor
  • BP medicines ke saath bina monitoring
  • Dengue mein use
  • Pregnancy mein bina doctor mashware
  • Kidney issues mein continuing

Conclusion

Brufen 400 Pakistan mein strong painkiller aur anti-inflammatory hai jo period cramps, joint pain, aur muscle injuries mein bohat effective. Magar pet ulcer, kidney damage, aur dengue mein bleeding ka risk hai. Khaane ke baad, max 3 tablets per day OTC, 2 hafte se zyada nahi bina doctor. Pregnancy 3rd trimester mein bilkul avoid. Ilaaj AI pe doctor consultation se safe alternatives aur correct dose ki guidance.

Frequently Asked Questions

Brufen 400 ki ek din mein kitni tablet?

Adults ke liye 1 tablet (400 mg) har 4-6 ghante baad. Maximum 3 tablets (1,200 mg) per 24 hours OTC. Doctor parchee se 6 tablets (2,400 mg) tak. Khaane ke baad lein — khaali pet pe stomach ulcer ka risk. 2 hafte se zyada use bina doctor mashware nahi.

Brufen 400 kis kis cheez ke liye use hoti hai?

Brufen 400 (ibuprofen) NSAID hai — pain killer + anti-inflammatory + bukhar utaarne wali. Common uses: sir dard, dant dard, period cramps (sab se effective), joint pain (arthritis), back pain, muscle aches, post-injury inflammation, sports injuries. Bukhar mein bhi kaam aati hai. Dengue mein NAHI — bleeding risk.

Brufen ke side effects kya hain?

Common: pet kharab, acidity, heartburn, mitli. Serious risks: stomach ulcer aur bleeding (sab se bara khatra), kidney damage (long-term), heart attack/stroke risk (high dose), high BP, fluid retention, allergic reactions (asthma sensitive), liver issues (rare). Risk reduce karne ke liye khaane ke baad lein, bohat paani piyo, aur 2 hafte se zyada use na karein.

Pregnancy mein Brufen safe hai?

Pregnancy ke 1st aur 2nd trimester mein limited use kuch cases mein OK ho sakti hai (doctor mashware se), magar 3rd trimester mein BILKUL nahi — fetal heart (premature ductus closure), kidney damage, aur labor delay ka risk. Pregnancy mein Panadol (paracetamol) safest option hai. Breastfeeding mein Brufen safe hai short-term use.

Brufen aur Panadol mein kya farq hai?

Brufen 400 NSAID hai — anti-inflammatory bhi hai (Panadol nahi), period cramps aur joint pain mein zyada effective, magar khaane ke baad lein, pregnancy 3rd trimester aur dengue mein avoid, stomach ulcer/kidney risk. Panadol pain + fever ke liye safe — pregnancy safe, dengue safe, khaali pet OK, magar overdose se liver damage. Dono ko alternate kar sakte hain stronger relief ke liye.
